scenarios.notes: Contest 48 and speculations 126,127,128 passed identity, role, odds, allowlist, and cap gates.
Harness, SDK/CLI v0.10.0, and market-maker commits were pinned and the live process sourced the approved environment independently.
Expected-address signer checks passed for flow and maker-a; maker-b and fresh-user remained idle.
Flow and maker-a used bounded one-time approvals; final PositionModule and TreasuryModule allowances were independently read back as zero.
A separate isolated dry window covered all six markets before live signing; one transient discovery fetch failure recovered on later ticks.
Maker-a posted bounded live quotes only for contests 48 and 49 with approvals.autoApprove false.
The target moneyline seed was fully matched without self-match; tx 0x0c8c59534aac759015d2b127500c0c44504ed8df100eed0ede2469da3f7c295a.
Owner-state evidence observed the target fill and post-fill position state; no identity divergence occurred.
Final public commitments, orderbooks, controlled-wallet active/pending/claimable positions, allowances, and orphan processes were zero.
Dry and live state/telemetry paths were isolated and the live run used fresh state with no stale replay.
Official final Minnesota Twins 4, Cleveland Guardians 13 matched contest 48 on-chain/API score.
Speculations 126,127,128 settled to the expected winning sides.

All winning controlled positions were claimed; one pre-send estimate failure after a same-run settle produced no transaction and a later direct claim succeeded. Final active/pending/claimable counts were zero.
Combined run risk, protocol fees, and per-wallet gas remained below approved caps; unsolicited micro-USDC inflows were separately attributed and excluded from protocol P&L.
